name: Statista Statistics and Market Data REST API
what_it_does: Statista statistics and market data REST API for businesses, researchers, marketers, and consultants to access over 1 million statistics, market forecasts, industry reports, consumer surveys, and infographics spanning 80,000+ topics across 170+ industries — enabling automated market research, competitive benchmarking, trend analysis, and data-driven content creation through Statista's comprehensive global statistics platform. Enables AI agents to access statistics for market size and industry metrics retrieval automation, handle market forecasts for growth projection and trend data automation, retrieve industry reports for sector analysis and benchmarking automation, access consumer surveys for customer insight and behavior data automation, manage infographic data for visual market data content automation, retrieve brand rankings for market share and consumer perception automation, access country data for geographic market comparison automation, retrieve economic indicators for macroeconomic analysis automation, manage topic search for cross-industry statistics discovery automation, and integrate Statista with BI tools, CMS, and research workflows for data-driven content automation.
use_cases: Enriching market research reports with cited statistics for consulting and analyst automation agents
Automating competitive benchmarking with industry market share data for strategy automation agents
Populating dashboards with current market size and growth forecasts for BI automation agents
Generating data-driven content with embedded statistics for marketing automation agents
not_for: Real-time financial market data (Statista is research statistics, not live stock/forex feeds)
Primary research and surveys (Statista aggregates published data, not custom survey collection)
Legal or regulatory filings requiring primary source data (Statista is secondary research aggregator)
best_when: A market researcher, business analyst, consultant, or marketer wanting AI agents to access vetted statistics, market forecasts, and industry data from Statista's database of 1M+ statistics across 80,000 topics for data-driven analysis and content.
avoid_when: PREMIUM SUBSCRIPTION REQUIRED: Full Statista API access requires premium subscription; automated free data assumption creates paywall_hit for premium statistics; automated must have Statista Enterprise account. CITATION REQUIREMENTS: Statista data requires proper attribution; automated uncited use assumption creates licensing_violation; automated must include Statista source attribution. DATA FRESHNESS VARIES: Statistics update on different schedules; automated real-time assumption creates stale_data for older statistics; automated must check publication date for time-sensitive analysis. COVERAGE GAPS EXIST: Statista has stronger coverage for developed markets; automated global uniformity assumption creates sparse_data for emerging markets and niche industries; automated must verify data availability for specific geographies.

auth.notes: Statista uses API key for statistics REST API. REST API with JSON. Hamburg, Germany HQ. Founded 2007. Products: Statistics, Market Insights, Consumer Insights, Company Insights, eCommerce Insights, Advertising & Media Insights. 1M+ statistics, 80,000+ topics, 170+ industries. 5M+ users, 23,000+ enterprise clients. Offices in Hamburg, New York, London, Singapore. Competes with Bloomberg, Euromonitor, and IBISWorld for business statistics and market research data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Limited free statistics on website; API access requires paid subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; Starter, Professional, Enterprise tiers; API access from Professional tier
pricing.notes: Hamburg DE. Annual subscription. Freemium website, paid API. 23,000+ enterprise clients. Global statistics leader.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; statistics retrieval throttled per subscription plan

known_agent_gotchas: STATISTIC IDS ARE REQUIRED: Statista statistics are retrieved by numeric ID; automated keyword-only assumption creates no_direct_lookup without first searching for statistic ID; automated must search for statistics and extract ID before retrieval

PUBLICATION DATE MATTERS: Statistics have original publication dates; automated current-data assumption creates outdated_statistic for statistics not recently updated; automated must filter by publication date for time-sensitive metrics

DOWNLOAD FORMATS VARY: Statistics available in PNG, PDF, XLS, PPT formats; automated single-format assumption creates format_mismatch for BI integrations expecting structured data; automated must request XLS/JSON format for data ingestion

PREMIUM STATISTICS REQUIRE HIGHER TIER: Some statistics are premium-only; automated uniform access assumption creates access_denied for premium content on lower plans; automated must handle premium paywall gracefully

MARKET INSIGHTS vs STATISTICS ARE DIFFERENT PRODUCTS: Statista Market Insights forecasts are separate from basic statistics and require different endpoints; automated unified API assumption creates product_confusion; automated must use correct endpoint per product type
agent_readiness.security_notes: Market data. GDPR, CCPA. API key. EU/US. Statistics usage and subscription data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Statistics aggregator. GDPR. API key. EU/US. Research data and usage analytics.
